expectations.text: Mentions updating the App Store ID in Firebase Project Settings
expectations.evidence: Response has a dedicated 'CRITICAL SETTING A: App Store ID' section with step-by-step instructions to find and update it in Firebase Console

expectations.text: Mentions verifying or updating the Team ID in Firebase
expectations.evidence: Response has 'CRITICAL SETTING B: Team ID' section with the correct value WGN6W58YD3 and instructions to update it in Firebase Console

expectations.text: Mentions checking BUNDLE_ID in GoogleService-Info.plist matches the new bundle ID
expectations.evidence: Response has 'GOOGLESERVICE-INFO.PLIST (Local File Update)' section describing how to verify and update BUNDLE_ID key
Response says 'Go to Firebase Console → Project Settings → Your Apps → Select iOS app → Click Download GoogleService-Info.plist → Replace ios/Runner/GoogleService-Info.plist with the downloaded file'
